items.title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise

items.title: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
items.raw_content: China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags behind models from Anthropic and OpenAI in other, more general tasks, it seems that China has dramatically reduced the gap in the capabilities between its models and those of […]

items.title: Suno launches Spark incubator program to feed independent artists to its AI machine
items.raw_content: Suno has ambitions to be more than just a toy to churn out AI slop, it also wants to be a streaming destination and to break new artists. items.title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama

items.title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
items.raw_content: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”

items.title: OpenAI will delay GPT-5.6 after Trump administration request
items.raw_content: The Trump administration, apprehensive of potential security issues, has reportedly asked OpenAI to stagger the release of its next big-ticket model, GPT-5.6. items.title: Prosecutors used ChatGPT logs as evidence in the Palisades fire trial
items.raw_content: Jonathan Rinderknecht was facing arson charges for setting a fire on New Year's Day in 2025, which became one of the deadliest wildfires in LA history. items.title: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 is back

items.title: Anthropic’s Mythos mess is only getting worse

items.title: Ford had to hire back former engineers to fix mistakes made by its automated systems
